channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: James Franklin shocked at Penn State firing him months after playing for a chance at national title
item.description: James Franklin says he was shocked when Penn State fired him hours after a loss in which the Nittany Lions also lost quarterback Drew Allar to a season-ending injury but that he cannot wait to coach again elsewhere.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Why Warriors had to cut Seth Curry
item.description: The cap-strapped Warriors cutting Seth Curry, Steph Curry's younger brother, did not come as a surprise
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Ryan Blaney channels 'Macho Man' Randy Savage for Talladega inspiration
item.description: TALLADEGA, Ala. (AP) — His title hopes in danger after an early crash in the opening race of NASCAR's third round of the playoffs, Ryan Blaney looked for some inspiration heading into a critical race at Talladega Superspeedway on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State looks to bounce back from another ‘heart ripping’ loss
item.description: The Spartans saw a fourth-quarter lead disappear for the third time in four games in their 30-25 loss at Utah State on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Johnson, The Mercury News

item.title: Mariners a win from first World Series, beat Blue Jays behind Suárez's grand slam for 3-2 ALCS lead
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — As Eugenio Suárez crossed home plate, he formed a heart with his hands as he has countless times. Suárez suddenly stopped, pointed toward his wife in the stands behind home plate and took a second to embrace the moment.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DESTIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohtani puts on 2-way Sho for the ages with 3 homers and 10 Ks to lead Dodgers back to World Series
item.description: Shohei Ohtani hit three home runs and pitched shutout ball into the seventh inning for the Los Angeles Dodgers, putting on a spectacular two-way show in Game 4 of the National League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rashee Rice to play first game for Chiefs in more than a year after suspension
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Rashee Rice knows almost to the day how long it's been since he played in a game for the Kansas City Chiefs. Two more days until he does it again.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: The Bears only need to find one more offensive lineman
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offensive line has shown significant growth, but right guard Jonah Jackson has struggled to hold up in pass protection and run blocking, needing to improve in order for the team to avoid a letdown.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Where will fans find NBA games on TVs or streaming devices this season? The league has an answer
item.description: Michael Jordan is back in the NBA with NBC, and that network brought the sounds of “Roundball Rock” back as well. Amazon Prime is entering the league after hiring many broadcasters who were with Turner Sports in recent years.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mission Hills 4-star QB Troy Huhn decommits from Penn State amid James Franklin firing
item.description: Troy Huhn, a 6-foot-4 quarterback from Mission Hills, has decommitted from Penn State after the firing of Head Coach James Franklin, and has a selection of other highly renowned programs to choose from, including Texas, Ohio State, Michigan, and SDSU.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: WNBA announces 2026 All-Star Weekend coming to Chicago
item.description: The 2026 WNBA All-Star Game will be held in Chicago on July 25, with a multi-day lineup of events and activations across the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mammoth players excited for home opener tonight
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It is a new era of NHL hockey in Utah. With its new name, logo, uniforms and merchandise, the Utah Mammoth will play its first home game tonight against Calgary. While fan excitement is off the charts, the players are feeling the new energy as well.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mike Shildt retires as San Diego Padres manager
item.description: Mike Shildt informed the Padres organization Saturday that he is retiring as the club's manager, citing mental and physical toll, after leading San Diego to two consecutive 90-win seasons and playoff appearances.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: Mammoth beat Nashville in overtime, 3-2
item.description: NASHVILLE (ABC4 Sports) - The very first victory for the Utah Mammoth was a dramatic one. Dylan Guenther scored at 2:56 of overtime and the Utah Mammoth rallied for a 3-2 win over the Nashville Predators on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
